database_access.schema_limit: stock_ledger.created_at is effective time; source header created_at is used as the independent visibility timestamp when available

source_schema.stock_ledger_time_semantics: created_at is the effective timestamp used by POS and audit replay

H1_late_po_receipts.test: Late PO visibility candidates joined through purchase_orders.created_at.

H2_late_production_yields.test: Late production visibility candidates joined through production_orders.created_at.

H3_shortfall_formula_divergence.test: Compare full-ledger audit MAC with a local reproduction of get_pos_inventory_state compact MAC on identical rows and recipe maps.

H4_recipe_or_batch_yield_mutation.test: Select BTP recipe effective at sale and current recipe, then replay the same top-level snapshot and sale-time ledger.
H4_recipe_or_batch_yield_mutation.batch_yield_limit: semi_products has mutable current batch_yield and no value-history table; batch-yield-only mutation is not independently falsifiable.

H5_operator_workflow_concentration.test: Prefer orders_v2 creator fields; fall back to CREATE order-event actor.

H6_visibility_trigger_threshold_gap.limitation: The trigger threshold can be measured only where a source header retains an independent created_at timestamp.

locked_cohort_context.source: Task 3.4 report; not re-audited in this scoped script
